heading: Ancillary supporting facilities
label: 2881 Ancillary supporting facilities
notes: Amendments2006—Subsec. (b). inserted “(other than a child development center)” after “ancillary supporting facility” in introductory provisions.Pub. L. 109–1631999— designated existing provisions as subsec. (a), inserted heading, and added subsec. (b).Pub. L. 106–65

children.heading: .—Authority To Acquire or Construct
children.label: a .—Authority To Acquire or Construct
children.text: Any project for the acquisition or construction of military family housing units or military unaccompanied housing units under this subchapter may include the acquisition or construction of ancillary supporting facilities for the housing units concerned.
the Army and Air Force Exchange Service;
any nonappropriated fund activity of the Department of Defense for the morale, welfare, and recreation of members of the armed forces.
